body:
<!-- Provide a clear description of the content -->

This PR adds an `UpwindBiasedGradient` operator that can be used in CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl#3843 (see [Tapio's comment](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/pull/3843#discussion_r2134392568)). This operator computes a first-order gradient with either left biasing or right biasing, depending on the direction of an associated velocity field. A convergence and correctness test has also been added.

- [x] Code follows the [style guidelines](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/) OR N/A.
- [x] Unit tests are included OR N/A.
- [x] Code is exercised in an integration test OR N/A.
- [x] Documentation has been added/updated OR N/A.
title: Add UpwindBiasedGradient operator
